quack.exe
project_01.exe — (RE)ROUTE
(RE)ROUTE
Web Application
General
Info: AIUX ResearchProduct DesignData
Location: Barcelona
Status: Prototype · On-going
Created: 2026
Context: Master's Thesis — ELISAVA
Stats
119K street segments scored
386 curated POIs
3 new ways to walk
Description

(re)Route is a walking app that asks a different question. 'What kind of walk do you need right now?' Type a mood, a vibe, or a destination in natural language. The AI routes you through Barcelona's most interesting, safest, or calmest streets depending on what the moment calls for.

TRY IT ↗
explore_mode.mov
Problem

Every navigation app solves the same problem: getting you there fast. But what about making the walk worth taking? (re)Route does more than just get you from A to B — it brings the city to you, with journeys that spark.

Approach
INTENT OVER INPUT

Users type feelings, not addresses. One AI call interprets mood as navigation intent.

DATA-INFORMED ROUTES

119K street segments scored for noise, safety, greenery. Routes built from real characteristics, not just distance.

SAFETY AS DEFAULT

After dark, every route auto-shifts to well-lit streets. Not a toggle — a baseline.

Differentiators
119K street segments scored

Noise, greenery, cleanliness, cultural richness, safety — real data, not guesses.

AI-powered discovery

"Artsy date" → experimental galleries, design bookshops, natural wine bars. Verified against real place data.

Safety as baseline

After dark, every route shifts to well-lit, active streets. Not a mode — always on.

386 hand-curated POIs

Places that don't appear on commercial platforms. Themed walks, bloom calendars, hidden courtyards.

project_02.exe — SNAPP
SNAPP
Mobile Web App
General
Info: Product DesignFull-StackUXGamification
Location: Global
Status: Deployed
Created: 2026
Context: Personal Project
Stats
1 word a day
24hr challenge
∞ moments of beauty
Description

Snapp is a location-based photo scavenger hunt. Each day, players get a single word prompt to search for around them. Photos land on a shared map, then disappear at midnight. It's a game about noticing the small stuff and sharing them with zero pretense.

TRY IT ↗
beta_test.mov
Problem

We walk past a thousand interesting things every day without noticing them. Snapp turns our everyday environment into a canvas for discovery, with a daily word prompt that gets everyone looking up and sharing what they find.

Approach
ONE CONSTRAINT

One word per day. The constraint IS the creativity. Limits create focus.

EPHEMERAL BY DESIGN

Map resets at midnight. No archive, no likes. The impermanence creates urgency without anxiety.

COLLECTIVE SEEING

Same prompt, different eyes. The city becomes a collaborative gallery through shared interpretation.

Differentiators
Anti-social media

No algorithm, no followers, no likes. Using a phone to make you look up from it.

Ephemeral by design

The map resets at midnight. Today's gallery lives for exactly one day.

Deliberate constraints

One word + one day = focus. The shared map creates connection without competition.

City-wide collaboration

Barcelona becomes a collaborative, ever-changing gallery that lives for one day.

project_03.exe — PLANMYTRIP
PLANMYTRIP
Web Application
General
Info: FrontendEditorial DesignInteractive
Location: Global
Status: Deployed
Created: 2026
Context: Personal Project — AI-assisted build
Stats
LIVE weather
AI recommendations
PDF downloads
Description

Trip planning tools are either ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates. PlanMyTrip is a planning surface that's editable, data-connected, and pretty enough to download directly. AI can even generate a base to help you get started.

TRY IT ↗
planmytrip.app
main.mov
Problem

Trip planning tools are either ugly spreadsheets or rigid templates. I wanted something useful that also looks like something you'd want to look at.

Approach
EDITOR NOT SPREADSHEET

Planning should feel like designing a magazine, not filling cells. The interface IS the experience.

LIVE DATA LAYER

Weather, images, and schedules pull in real-time. The tool stays current so you don't have to.

DESIGN-FIRST WORKFLOW

Start with how it looks, then fill in the details. Visual hierarchy drives the planning process, not the other way around.

Differentiators
Magazine-quality layouts

City intro slides, photo galleries, day timelines — planning you'd actually screenshot and share.

Multi-provider image search

Find and place destination photos or auto-fill to populate the itinerary instantly.

Weather-aware itineraries

Live Open-Meteo data per destination. See conditions for every day of the trip, updated in real-time.

Inline everything

Click any text to edit. Drag to reorder. No modals, no forms — just direct manipulation.

(RE)ROUTE
AI Walking Navigation
TRY
What if navigation optimised for how you feel, not just where you go? Type a mood, a vibe, or a destination. The AI routes you through Barcelona's most interesting streets.
119K
segments scored
386
curated POIs
3
walk modes
What's New
*119K street segments scored for noise, safety, greenery
*AI discovery: mood to route in one call
*Safety baseline after dark — always on
*386 hand-curated POIs not on commercial platforms
Approach
INTENT OVER INPUT
Users type feelings, not addresses. One AI call interprets mood as navigation intent.
DATA-INFORMED ROUTES
119K segments scored. Routes from real characteristics, not just distance.
SAFETY AS DEFAULT
After dark, every route auto-shifts to well-lit streets.

weather

itineraries

downloads

Hi Lyla! Came across your portfolio — really impressive. 2:14 PM
Are you open to new opportunities? 2:14 PM
Hey! Definitely exploring — the right opportunity gets me excited. 2:15 PM
